---
title: "Home Page"
author: "Genetics lab technicians"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---
### https://github.com/arabellaterpinlewis 
### https://github.com/emiboydtucker
![Greenland shark](https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcQVy9BEdcziSjrXsITQ5Hj6HE-wwgtL_iRjyg&s)

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
